The first race of the Classics, the Satsuki Sho, is underway. 
The runners battle for the lead as they pass the stands.

The second-favorite, Biwa Hayahide, goes wide and 
smoothly joins the front pack.
She's that far already?! Hayahide's a really good starter!
But I'm still gonna beat her with my own style!

The racers all round the second corner into the 
backstretch.

Winning Ticket's holding midfield. Narita Taishin's second 
to last.

Taishin's gonna rush up from the back like in the Yayoi 
Sho.

But Hayahide's running in front. She's not an opponent you 
catch up with easily.
So I have to get a move on, NOW!
Winning Ticket is sprinting ahead!
Farther! I'm going for first!

She's already going for it? I won't hand over the lead that 
easily!
Hraaah!

Biwa Hayahide pushes forward! The two favorites are vying 
for the lead as they turn the final corner!
Here's my chance!

What?! How does she have so much stamina left after 
powering through the start?!
Huh?!

What's this?! From the outside, coming in one swift burst 
is… Narita Taishin! It's Narita Taishin!
Aaaaagh!
No way! How could she catch up from that far back?!
Tch! No, I have to win! The Derby's only one step away!
RAAAAAGH!

It's Narita Taishin! Narita Taishin has surged from behind 
to victory! The winner of the Satsuki Sho is Narita Taishin!

Second goes to Biwa Hayahide! Today's favorite, Winning 
Ticket, is beaten!
I lost… I couldn't keep up with either Taishin or Hayahide…

That was everything I had… I tried my best and lost… How 
am I gonna win the Derby?
